title: More Advancements!
description: A mod that adds More Advancements! Currently adds 12!
body:
# More Advancements!
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1247254072696897596?label=join%20our%20discord&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/T5nnUu9CWv)


This mod currently adds 12 advancements. Which I thought added more fun to the game.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The 12 advancements are: More Advancements, Bucket List, Fill It Up, Cold!, Cool It Down, Hot Stuff Cool It Down, Glow Up, String Theory, String Theory II, Stone Age II, Funguy, And Light It Up.

</details>

I am also open to suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/T5nnUu9CWv)



# ❓ Why should you download?

I think you should download if you would like more goals in the game if it is getting boring.

# 💻 Alpha

This mod is currently in alpha and will be continuously updated.
